message:
fix(bd-1gfe): redact access token values from Debug output

AccessToken previously derived Debug, which would leak raw bearer tokens
into logs and traces. This replaces the derived Debug with a custom
implementation that shows the scheme but redacts the token value as
"<redacted>".

Changes:
- Custom fmt::Debug impl for AccessToken that prints token as "<redacted>"
- Updated existing debug test to assert redaction (no raw "abc" in output)
- Added auth_context_debug_redacts_nested_token test to verify AccessToken
  redaction propagates through AuthContext debug formatting

The serde Serialize/Deserialize, Clone, PartialEq, and Eq derives are
preserved unchanged — only debug display is affected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
